Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Guess I need to push my limits even harder...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3053 0 0}Oh, sorry, Koromaru. Hey, listen, I was just thinking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}What do you say to a little exploring, just you and me? Might make for decent training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3107 0 0}Heh, rarin' to go, huh? Glad I can always count on you, Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3027 0 0}Phew... That was pretty tough on our own. Should've figured.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}Don't get me wrong, I'm not beating myself up over it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}I know there's only so much I handle by myself... Not like I can think fast on my feet, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}No matter what's in front of me, I always come out swinging the second the bell rings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I've gone through this exact same thing before, but I guess I just forgot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}Was it after we got weaker...? No, it must have happened way before that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3042 0 0}Thanks for this, Koromaru. Sorry you had to put up with such a moron.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3068 0 0}...Hang on, was there something weighing on your mind, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I had no clue. You just look like the same ol' handsome devil to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Well, should we start heading back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}But don't tell Aigis or Mitsuru about any of this. It'll be our heads if they find out we went off exploring on our own.[n]{f 1 1}
